steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks for the main purpose of the text. The passage introduces ohmic heating, notes a recent research application in Brazil, then explains what makes it an improvement over conventional thermal methods: it generates heat throughout the food rather than transferring it from the surface inward.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• "It suggests that there are possible flaws in ohmic heating technologies that have not yet been well researched.": The passage presents ohmic heating positively; no flaws are mentioned. ✗
  • "It introduces ohmic heating as a food preservation technology and identifies one of its advantages.": Matches the passage exactly — it names ohmic heating and explains its specific advantage over conventional methods. ✓
  • "It provides an overview of the research into ohmic heating both globally and in a specific country.": Only one country (Brazil) is mentioned, and the passage's focus is on the technology's advantage, not a research overview. ✗
  • "It explains why conventional heating methods are popular in commercial applications and proposes a shift away from these methods.": The passage does not explain why conventional methods are popular, nor does it propose any shift. ✗
That matches the correct answer — B is correct.
